title: 3,000 miles on my legs vlog bike touring in Europe 2010

transcript.text: Hello, this is a bike touring blog, 3,208 miles on my leg, the 3,000 mile blog, talking
About how my legs are doing or whatever, um, my body, um, surprisingly, my belly is still
Huge, dude, I've got a pot belly still, man, um, um, shortly after doing the 2,000, and
I did include it in the blog, because it was after the 2,000, I noticed I was able to start
Riding in the drops, and that was cool, um, before that it hurt my butt too much, I can
Basically ride in the drops all day now, you know, and also like riding out of the saddle
In the drops, um, which I couldn't really do before, felt awkward, but now I can, um, but
Since the last, since I've been, let's see, I'm two months in right now, bike touring 2,000,
Or 3,200 miles, that's like 4,500 kilometers or something, uh, and I, uh, so, yeah, my
Leg speed, I noticed, was really high like a couple weeks ago or whatever on my way into
Belgrade, but then I spent four nights in Belgrade, and, you know, and then I had like a couple
Hundred mile days or whatever, and then I spent three nights in Sarajevo, and then, um, I had
Like a big day, and then I had like a really like small day, and then I had a couple of
Big days, and then I took a day off in Pristina, and then I stayed three nights in Skopje, so
That was like a pretty easy day, and then two full days off, and then I had today, which
Is a big day, so from like a training standpoint, point of view, I'm definitely under riding,
You know, I'm not riding as much as I should if I wanted to, like, get strong, fast, but,
Um, uh, well, you know, because I'm also traveling, it's not all about training, but, um, I, uh,
I, I have really, I don't really know about my leg speed that much, really, you know, since
In the last couple weeks, but I definitely do have better leg speed than I did before,
I think after 2,000 miles, although it's kind of hard to tell, um, but my endurance has gone
Up, definitely, um, the last time I had like a big day, I had a nine hour day, a couple
Weeks ago, I guess you could say the 2,000 mark, um, in, um, my way out of Zagreb, that
Was nine hours, from noon to nine, and I was kind of tired, you know, and I was like, I
Had a lot less, some gas, you know, some steam on the way into that town, Pozico, whatever,
Um, and then today was actually my longest day, I broke the record for longest day today,
And, um, you know, and since then I haven't really been riding that much, but I still have
Better endurance, um, you know, because I've, I'm able to completely recover, um, I've, I've
Had lots of days where I'm totally fresh, because I spend so much time in these capital cities
And where I don't do anything, and maybe that work is, is actually going to work out well
For me, you know, I'm not overtraining at all, and I can start and do that overtraining
Thing later, which I definitely will get the opportunity to do, but, um, I, uh, but my
Endurance was good today, I, uh, I rode from, I got up, started riding 835 today, which is
My second earliest day, my earliest was 830 in Princeton, um, Poland, although I was
Under-slept, because I was up, you know, drinking beers with the people in the Postal
Until midnight, and then I didn't actually get to sleep until, like, 3 or something,
So, you know, I was, I had, like, 6 hours of laying in bed, and then, like, 3 hours
Of actual sleep, but, um, you know, I had a couple cups of coffee, and then I was okay,
But, yeah, today I rode, like, um, well, 12, um, let's see, I rode until about 9, so 12
And a half hours, but that's with, like, 2 hours of, um, fucking around on my flats,
I got a couple of flats on the first one, it was complicated, so, um, um, but I had
Gas, I, I still had energy, and I felt good the whole day, and I didn't even, you know,
Stop to eat, I just ate, what did I eat today?
Not all that much, and, you know, I feel good, so, I think my endurance is going up,
And it's getting better, um, but, yeah, I think I still am muscular, um, I still have
A belly, um, it's just, so, yeah, after 3,000 miles, it's kind of weird, so maybe after 4,000
Miles, I'll have less of a belly, I did look at my, I did flex, I'm like, in the mirror
When I was in Pristina, and I did, my abs did come out more, and I had, my ribs came out
More, so, you know, I guess I'm just losing fat, but it's just the last place to go is the
Belly, um, but, yeah, I still have that, after 3,000 miles, um, I'm at 3,208, because
I guess I didn't look at my odometer, so I'll be doing 4,000 pretty damn soon, and by then,
You know, we'll see, um, I think my endurance is going to start going up soon, that's my
Prediction, where I can start riding, like, and hopefully start getting up earlier, you
Know, and then ride 12 hours a day, from, like, 8.30 in the morning to 8.30 at night, type
Of a thing, like, without stopping at all, you know, like, I wouldn't have stopped today,
And I would have made it from freaking Skopje to Tirana today, if it hadn't been for those
Flats, I wouldn't have been able to ride straight through, I think it would have been easier
For me, too, because I feel a little bit off when I started again, but maybe not, maybe
I would have hurt more, but it's hard to tell, but I'm looking forward to my first 12-hour
Day, where I don't stop, see how that goes, but anyways, um, I, uh, I don't, I don't think
I'm needing to eat that much, so far, um, while I eat, while I ride, um, I had a bunch
Of bananas, um, how many bananas, like, five bananas, you know, to be breakfast, and then
While I'm riding, after 40 miles, usually, as my rule, I start eating, which is, like, after,
Like, three hours or something, um, I, uh, eat five bananas, an apple, um, and then I
Didn't have anything, and then I had the flats, and after the flats, I had a huge bag, like,
A half kilo of, uh, raisins, and then a few hours later, like, right as the sun was going
Down, I had, like, before the sun went down, I had, like, maybe three energy bars, three
Or four energy bars, and that's all I ate today, I needed to have dinner, because I camped, you
Know, and so I'm not hungry, so I'd eaten all that much, um, but yeah, I think my appetite's
Going to go up, my endurance is going to go up, um, my stomach was a little bit weird
Today, but I think it'll be, my stomach will get better, so anyways, that's after 3,000
Miles, I'm going to start riding hard now, though, because I'm leaving the small countries,
And I'm going to start going into the bigger countries where there's no reason to stop and
Hang out in a city for, like, four days, so there you go.
Here we go.
